CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $750.00 FILED BY CARDONA JOSE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT S AND C MOTORS INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC
